scripts.dev: concurrently -c "#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fdba74,#86efac" -n "server,queue,vite,admin" --kill-others-on-fail "php artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=8000" "php artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0" "vite" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:admin
